findings.description: Pre-computed verification in evaluator packets cut spot-check tool use to one or zero per unit.
Tier-3 batch size was too aggressive — 12 files in one tier strained the evaluator's context.
findings.evidence: Two of three contract-fit verdicts emitted parse-failure: budget-exhausted.

findings.description: Cap tier batch size at 8 files for evaluator panels of size 2+.
